prestazioni: Full bolt-on turbo system for the S58B30T0 engine featuring a Garrett GTX5533R Gen II turbocharger with billet compressor wheel (64mm inducer, 88mm exducer), custom 3.5-inch titanium downpipe with 200-cell catalytic converters, and a CSF intercooler with 11-row core and 4.5L capacity to handle 800+ WHP on E85

MCS 2-way adjustable remote-reservoir coilovers with 30-way compression and rebound damping, custom valving for the X4 M Competition's F98 chassis, and spherical bearing top mounts from 034Motorsport to eliminate compliance

Full Motec M150 ECU and PDM (Power Distribution Module) standalone management with flex-fuel sensor, individual cylinder fuel trims, and launch control mapped to 6,500 RPM for consistent 0-60 mph times under 3.0 seconds on drag radials
estetica: Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit for the F98 X4 M Competition, featuring carbon fiber fenders with 50mm extended wheel arches, custom front splitter with integrated canards, and a duckbill rear spoiler with adjustable Gurney flap

Vorsteiner V-FF 109 22-inch forged wheels in matte gold finish, staggered 22x10.5 ET35 front and 22x12 ET45 rear, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (285/30R22 front, 325/25R22 rear) for maximum mechanical grip

Full Akrapović Evolution Line Titanium exhaust system with quad 100mm carbon fiber tips, integrated electronic bypass valves, and a custom X-pipe resonator delete for an aggressive S58 exhaust note without drone at highway speeds
